name: ShaForge
description: Next-generation mobile-native build orchestration leveraging Android Virtualization Framework (AVF) and pKVM to empower developers with sustainable, low-cost hardware.

goals.description: Acquisition of diverse ARM SoC testbeds (Snapdragon Gen 3/4, MediaTek Dimensity, Google Tensor) to build the industry's first open-source thermal-aware scheduling database for mobile-native compilation.
Research and development into low-overhead pKVM memory management specifically for high-memory-pressure tasks like Android Kernel builds and LLM quantization on mobile.

impact.target_audience: Mobile-first developers, students in emerging markets, and hardware enthusiasts.
impact.sustainability_model: Zero-cost CI/CD scaling using GitHub Actions combined with on-device hardware optimization.
